## Type

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] docs
- [ ] test
- [ ] chore / ci / build

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes (api + web)
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] Tests added/updated and `npm run test -w api` passes
- [ ] No secrets committed; input validated at boundaries
- [ ] RBAC/audit considered for any new state-changing endpoint
- [ ] Conventional Commit title (e.g. `feat(api): ...`)
